rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSAO VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 02, 2020 line 3. For Motion For Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Defendant moves for a summary judgment arguing that Plaintiff failed to allege factual support and lacks any evidence for its estimated rent demand of $9,348.17. The motion is not based on lack of statement of amount owed or on lack of a contractual provision entitling the landlord to a payment. The motion is based on lack of allegations and evidence to support the amount demanded. In opposition Plaintiff does not dispute that in discovery no evidence was provided substantiating the amount demanded and Plaintiff provides no such evidence in opposition. Specifically, Lease attached to the opposition provides for payment of rent, but not for the amount of rent demanded. No other evidence is provided to create a triable issue of fact re: amount demanded. = (501/CFH)
